name: Summer Chili
recipeIngredient: 1 cup dark red kidney beans, drained and washed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, cook onions and garlic in oil until tender.
2. Add chicken broth, kidney beans, celery, carrots, squash, zucchini, bell peppers, mushrooms, tomatoes, and tomato sauce to the pan. Stir until everything is soft.
3. Mix in chili powder, cumin, black pepper, and cayenne. Blend well.
4. Simmer the mixture for 1 to 2 hours or until it becomes bubbly.
